“菲尔德少爷，有农民从九曲河里打捞上来一个鎏银金龙椅！”
“啥？我可是老实人。”
菲尔德的话音未落，众人立即一拥而上，将菲尔德抬上了鎏银金龙椅。
与此同时，一顶光彩夺目的王冠也缓缓戴在了菲尔德头顶之上。
众人齐声高喊：“我等愿为伟大的菲尔德皇帝世代效忠，为皇征四方，永不背叛！”
众人的声音清澈洪亮，于四面八方回荡。
“你们可真是害苦了我呀！”
嘴上说着不要，身体却很诚实，他的嘴角微微上扬，比AK还要难压。
“那……，那我试一试……”
……
天启元年，天启帝国正式建国，洛亚大陆的迈入了史诗的一步，混乱终结倒计时……
充斥着虚伪、欺骗与野蛮的洛亚大陆，强者肆意欺压弱者；弱者艰难地苟且偷生，文明不再文明，那就让野蛮更加野蛮！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o21e13c3e0b4093c2711c54f875a2f54f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱数学的大学生","author_id":"","book_id":"7325066118261902398","book_name":"领主：子爵变侯爵，做大做强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#080820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5146人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7342315891427656254","read_count":"5146","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1358340"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"630","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻仙侠,奇幻,玄幻,架空,异世大陆,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f2b44bc77e059f4fb12d33105152ad74~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386594&x-signature=gTAJ20AKvEkWsBowkLFgXL6HniY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4196159263871079","ext
